title: pilosella pinea
intro: Pilosella pinea, also known as False Fox-glove or Pulsatilla pinea, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family and native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pilosella pinea include reducing inflammation, easing respiratory congestion, and acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps. Herbal preparations of Pilosella pinea often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to skin conditions.
